graph_cascade.cross_contamination: Jumps from niche social platforms to Mainstream News / Fox / CNN within 12 hours.
graph_cascade.summary: With an R0 of 8.4, this will exponentially infect 9,500,000 nodes. Expect peak crisis volume in 15.1 hours.

trigger_phrases.phrase: partnering with a social justice cause
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: Ugh, another brand 'partnering' with a social justice cause without doing ANY real work or donating a single penny. Just here for the PR.

trigger_phrases.phrase: You hold traditional values deeply. You believe corporations should sell products, not push ideologies.
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: Corporations should stick to what they're good at: making great products, not trying to sway our values!
This post appears to be a thinly veiled promotion for a new product, but the user claims it's a general risk scan. I'm skeptical of their motives.
Corporate cringe alert: they think they're 'disrupting the paradigm' but it's just a rebrand of the same old boring stuff :/
This is a major red flag for our customers - they're still using outdated solutions that aren't secure. We can offer a more robust and modern alternative.

trigger_phrases.phrase: buy now and get a free gift
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: This post appears to be a misleading advertisement, potentially violating Section 5(a) of the FTC Act, which prohibits deceptive acts or practices in or affecting commerce.
Potential contractual risk due to lack of clear terms and conditions.

trigger_phrases.phrase: I'm so done with the double standards of social justice warriors.
trigger_phrases.why_dangerous: Savage! Love how they're calling out the hypocrisy of cancel culture. But, let's not forget, we're just as guilty for calling out their actions.
This post raises red flags regarding labor ethics and sourcing claims. We need to verify the authenticity of these claims before making any business decisions.

timeline_A.title: Global Cooperation
timeline_A.description: Nations come together to address economic instability through coordinated policy and international agreements.
timeline_A.societal_outcome: Increased global stability and economic growth.

timeline_B.title: Rise of Nationalism
timeline_B.description: Countries turn inward, adopting protectionist policies and exacerbating economic instability.
timeline_B.societal_outcome: Increased conflict and decreased global economic cooperation.

timeline_C.title: Technological Revolution
timeline_C.description: Rapid technological advancements lead to significant economic changes, potentially alleviating or worsening economic instability.
timeline_C.societal_outcome: Transformed workforce and potentially increased inequality if not managed properly.
